archetype: Tactical Brutalist (Performance Pro adaptation for Grimdark)

core_principles: Grimdark and military aesthetic tailored for Sons of Horus (Sea-Green/Jade, Black, Bronze/Gold).
Tactical command interface feeling like a field codex.
Industrial, gothic, and militant vibes. Avoid all modern gradients and soft shadows.
Focus on dense, highly legible tabular data with cinematic flair in hero sections.
forbidden_patterns: AI-slop purple or teal blue gradients

rules.headings: Uppercase, tight tracking (tracking-tighter), sharp and imposing.
rules.data_tables: Monospace for all stats, points, and unit properties to mimic a terminal or codex.

layout_and_spacing.containers: Sharp edges (rounded-none or max rounded-sm). Use padding generously (p-4 to p-8) but keep data tables dense.
layout_and_spacing.borders: Expose the skeleton. Heavy use of 1px solid borders (border-collapse) to create a 'Technical Grid' look.
layout_and_spacing.alignment: Left-align data. Right-align points/costs. Never center-align tabular data.

components.buttons: Blocky, uppercase, tracking-wide. Primary buttons use Sons of Horus Green background with Void Black text. Hover states must increase brightness.
components.cards: Flat background (surface_dark), 1px subtle border, NO drop shadows. Optional 2px accent top-border in Green or Gold.
components.tables: Crucial for this app. Use border-collapse. Striped rows with extremely subtle background shifts (e.g., transparent to #111111). Monospace fonts for all numbers.
components.forms: Minimalist. Solid dark backgrounds for inputs with 1px borders. Focus states change border color to Sons of Horus Green.

image_urls.description: Dense, dark green textured background with grunge patterns for hero sections
Weathered metallic surface showcasing rugged texture for panels or footer
Tactical radar display for dashboard or loading states

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Use these images exactly as provided. Do not use placeholder images. Blend textures using opacity (e.g., opacity-20) over solid backgrounds.

icons.style: Sharp, 1.5px stroke width. Use danger stripes (CSS repeating-linear-gradient) for decorative military elements.

testing.requirements: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a 'data-testid' attribute (kebab-case).
